title: Pricing table
summary: Three-tier pricing grid with a highlighted plan, feature list per tier, CTAs, and tooltips for advanced features.
brief: Build a marketing pricing section with three plans side-by-side. Highlight the middle (recommended) plan. Each plan has a title, price, a list of features, and a CTA button. Hovering a feature with an 'info' hint shows a tooltip.

steps.reason: Progressive disclosure for nuanced feature descriptions

checklist.check: Recommended tier has visible emphasis (border or ring) plus the badge.
CTA button's aria-label names the plan (e.g. 'Choose Pro') when text is generic.
[Card] Avoid: Nesting cards
[Card] Avoid: Using Card when a simple div with border would suffice
[Card] Avoid: Forgetting CardContent padding when placing forms inside
[Card] A11y: Card is a div by default. Add role='region' and aria-label for landmark cards. CardTitle renders h3 — ensure heading hierarchy.
[Badge] Avoid: Using destructive variant for non-error states
[Badge] Avoid: Badge text too long
[Badge] A11y: Purely decorative by default. Add role='status' for dynamic status badges.
[Separator] Avoid: Using as spacing instead of semantic separation
[Separator] Avoid: Forgetting orientation='vertical' needs parent height
[Separator] A11y: Set decorative=false if the separator conveys semantic meaning. Radix handles role='separator'.
[Tooltip] Avoid: Forgetting TooltipProvider at the app root
[Tooltip] Avoid: Tooltip content too long (keep it under one line)
[Tooltip] Avoid: Using Tooltip as the only label for icon buttons (still add aria-label)
[Tooltip] Avoid: Triggering tooltips on non-interactive elements
[Tooltip] A11y: Triggers on focus and hover. Radix sets role='tooltip' and aria-describedby. Still pair icon buttons with aria-label since tooltips don't announce on touch.
[Button] Avoid: Using 'destructive' variant for non-destructive actions
[Button] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside asChild button
[Button] Avoid: Missing aria-label when using icon-only size='icon' variant
[Button] Avoid: Using onClick for navigation instead of asChild with a link
[Button] A11y: Automatically handles focus ring, disabled state, and aria attributes. Icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label. Loading state automatically sets disabled.
